episodes.title: Judge releases Epstein suicide note
episodes.description: According to the cellmate Epstein wrote "time to say good bye." It was reportedly written in July of 2019 following Epstein's first failed suicide attempt.

episodes.title: Commerce Secretary Lutnick faces questions over Epstein ties on Capitol Hill
episodes.description: Democrats questioned Lutnick about past contact with Jeffrey Epstein during a rare closed-door congressional interview.

episodes.title: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi will testify before the House Oversight Committee next month
episodes.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi will testify before the House Oversight Committee regarding her handling of the Epstein files.

episodes.title: Epstein survivors attending State of the Union
episodes.description: Epstein survivors are attending President Donald Trump's 2026 State of the Union address.
